problem id: 78989fb5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10101001 -> 10110000
  00001000 -> 10000010
  01001000 -> 10010110
  11111011 -> 10000001
  11101110 -> 11010101
  01000101 -> 01000101
  01110000 -> 00011011
  10010010 -> 00001101

query: 00000110
predicted answer: 01100001
